caption:
Google changed how Local Services Ads pay you back, and most shops running them haven't caught it yet.

The old review link you've been texting customers stopped working.

Your Google Business Profile now has to stay linked and verified or your ads shut off with zero warning.

Every call over 30 seconds bills as a lead whether it was a real job or a wrong number.

The only way to get that charge back: mark it Dissatisfied with a specific reason inside 30 days.

If your team isn't rating leads daily, you're paying full price for calls that should've been free.

DM "AUDIT" for a second set of eyes on where your ad spend is leaking.

#LocalServicesAds #HomeServices #ContractorMarketing #HVACMarketing #RoofingMarketing
rationale: Current, high-relevance news for LSA advertisers (contractors, HVAC, roofing) that most owners haven't tracked; carousels are the format currently pulling the strongest saves/shares per platform data, and this delivers the exact checklist to act on this week instead of just flagging the change.
